name: cgm_insights
description: CGM analysis, glycemic phenotype triage, and (M2) billing-readiness documentation from Nightscout data.

handlers.description: Renders an AGP-style CGM summary as a custom patient chart section.
Surfaces a glycemic phenotype triage ProtocolCard and optional hypoglycemia-safety banner on encounter creation.
When CGM data-sufficiency is met, emits a codified summary Observation and a review/sign ProtocolCard for CGM/RPM billing readiness.
